title: Vector Addition
text: Calculate the $$x$$ components and $$y$$ components for Vectors A and B and add them up to find the total $$x$$ and $$y$$ of the resultant vector R.

title: Apply Trigonometric Functions and the Pythagorean theorem
text: Solve $$\sqrt{\left(15cos\left(30\right)+25cos\left(40\right)\right)^2+\left(15sin\left(30\right)-25sin\left(40\right)\right)^2}$$. The $$x$$ component is $$15cos\left(30\right)+25cos\left(40\right)$$ and the $$y$$ component is $$15sin\left(30\right)-25sin\left(40\right)$$. Then apply the Pythagorean theorem.
